Japanese WordNet reference notice

Project:
https://bond-lab.github.io/wnja/

Repository usage note:
- vocabulary generation scripts in `scripts/vocab/` consult a local
  `wnjpn.db` copy during data preparation
- the raw Japanese WordNet database is not redistributed in this repository
- the project treats bundled `assets/words_core.jsonl` conservatively as an
  edited dataset influenced by Japanese WordNet output

License guidance summary used by this repository:
- upstream documentation describes Japanese WordNet data as reusable with
  retention of copyright / disclaimer notices in copies and redistributions
- before redistributing raw Japanese WordNet data, consult the upstream
  project pages and keep the original notices intact
